title: CSV Upload Response Schema
description: Schema for the response from the /upload-csv API endpoint

success.description: Whether the upload and processing was successful

message.description: Human-readable message about the upload result

columns.description: List of standardized column names after processing

items.description: A single data record with standardized column names

column_mapping.description: Mapping of original column names to standardized names (only includes changed columns)

original_filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded CSV file
